summary: Iteration 3 e2e testing — Stripe checkout (guide_pdf $20, pro_month $49, pro_annual $470), Make.com social auto-post (intentionally unconfigured -> 503), entitlements, /payment-success polling. Backend: 17/17 pytest passed. Frontend: all critical flows verified (Buy Guide, Go Pro, Make-10/10, Auto-Post FB, Free scroll, /payment-success polling). 1 backend reliability bug found in /api/checkout/status/{id} returning 500 on retrieve failure.

minor.issue: Throws bare 500 (CheckoutError -> uncaught) when Stripe cannot retrieve the session (unknown id, session not found in proxy, or recently-created session not yet fetchable via the emergent stripe proxy). Should be wrapped in try/except -> 404 or 502. The PaymentSuccess.jsx polling page recovers fine because it counts errors and falls into 'failed' after MAX_POLLS, but the noisy 500 bleeds into logs and is fragile. Repro: GET /api/checkout/status/cs_test_invalid -> 500. Even GET /api/checkout/status/{just_created_id} sometimes 500's because the emergent proxy session is not retrievable via the same key route.

'Bad signature' returns 400 for the right reason (KeyError on 'data' field) but the underlying emergent integrations handle_webhook does NOT actually verify the Stripe-Signature HMAC. Anyone posting a well-formed event body would be accepted. Status code is correct for the test's body (no data) but signature verification is effectively absent in the wrapper. Worth verifying with the integration.

action_items: (LOW) Wrap /api/checkout/status/{id} in try/except CheckoutError -> raise HTTPException(404, 'Session not found') or 502. Currently surfaces as 500 in browser console + backend stack trace.
(LOW) Confirm whether emergentintegrations handle_webhook verifies Stripe-Signature HMAC; if not, document this so production deploys do not silently accept forged webhook events.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:561 checkout_status — no try/except around sc.get_checkout_status; any Stripe-side failure becomes a 500. Should be 404 for invalid id and 502 for transient.

server.py:610 stripe_webhook — relies on integrations layer for signature verification; current behavior on bad/missing signature is to fail at 'data' key access rather than at signature check. Add explicit signature header presence check and maybe own HMAC verification.

server.py:670 social_post — 503 short-circuits BEFORE listing existence check, so callers can't distinguish 'bad listing_id' from 'webhook unconfigured' until MAKE_WEBHOOK_URL is set. Acceptable trade-off for now but worth flipping the order so 404 takes precedence when listing_id is bogus.

server.py:521-522 webhook_url construction — `f"{host_url}api/webhook/stripe".replace("//api","/api")` is a fragile string hack. base_url already has trailing slash; just do f"{host_url.rstrip('/')}/api/webhook/stripe".
server.py:35 MAKE_WEBHOOK_URL is read once at module import; if env changes the process must be restarted. Documented but worth noting.

PaymentSuccess.jsx — polling counts error responses toward MAX_POLLS, which means a perma-500 endpoint converges to 'failed' state after ~12s. UX is OK but if status endpoint returns 404 cleanly (per fix above), the page can short-circuit to 'failed' on first poll and skip the wait.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_stripe_social.py (NEW — 17 tests covering pricing, checkout/session for all 3 packages, invalid package -> 400, status invalid id, webhook bad signature -> 400, entitlements, social/post 503 path + 404 path, full regression on rewrite/advisor/examples/listings/feedback/root)
test_credentials: Not applicable (no auth in app). STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent works against emergent stripe proxy and creates real test-mode checkout sessions.
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed listworks sessions (TEST_social_sess, TEST_tx_*, TEST_ent_*, TEST_sess_*) and 4 stripe checkout sessions in payment_transactions (status=initiated, payment_status=pending) — all created against test mode, never charged. Listings persisted under TEST_social_sess in db.listings. 1 feedback row (TEST_qa@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe live: clicking Buy Guide / Go Pro / Make-10/10 redirects to https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_... — payment page renders correct amount ($20 / $49). Cannot complete actual payment in headless tests (requires card+browser interaction). /payment-success polling works: cs_test_invalid -> 500 from /api/checkout/status -> attempts counter increments -> 'payment-failed' state after ~6s. Auto-Post FB button correctly hits /api/social/post which 503s with toast 'Social auto-post not configured. Add MAKE_WEBHOOK_URL.' — this is the intended path. Make-10/10 button now starts pro_month checkout (was a toast stub before). pricing-cta-free scrolls to playground (smooth, may take >1s). pricing-cta-team opens mailto. All previously green endpoints (rewrite, advisor, video, examples, listings, feedback) regression-clean.
rca of the issue: /api/checkout/status 500 bug RCA: server.py line 568 calls `await sc.get_checkout_status(stripe_session_id)` with no exception handling. emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout.get_checkout_status raises CheckoutError on any Stripe error (e.g. invalid_request_error 'No such checkout.session'), which propagates as unhandled 500. Mitigation: wrap in try/except CheckoutError -> raise HTTPException(404, 'Session not found'). Reproduction: curl ${BACKEND}/api/checkout/status/cs_test_invalid -> 500 + stacktrace in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log.
